reasoning: The Polymarket price as of October 16, 2025, just ten days before the knowledge cutoff, was firmly at 85%. Given the lack of a web search tool in this environment, my most reliable evidence is this strong late-stage market consensus. A probability of 85% just six weeks before the November 30 deadline strongly indicates that concrete plans (e.g., an explicit announcement, active mainnet, or final testnet stage) were in place. I have applied a very slight downward adjustment to 83% to account for base-rate typical crypto project delays or technical snags that could unexpectedly push a launch past the exact November 30 deadline within the final ~35 days.
